name: meraki-codex-ops
description: Project-local Codex workspace plugin for Meraki Roots WordPress/WooCommerce launch work, with durable MCP defaults and agent workflow guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-local Codex MCP defaults and agent workflow guidance for Meraki Roots launch work.
interface.longDescription: Meraki Codex Ops packages the durable Codex setup for this WordPress/WooCommerce workspace: pinned MCP server defaults, read-only exploration/review/research role guidance, and verification expectations aligned with the repo AGENTS.md.
defaultPrompt: Inspect Meraki launch blockers and verify locally.
Review WooCommerce plugin changes for safety.
Check primary docs before changing MCP config.
